title: Software Engineer

rationales.taskAutomation: Boilerplate, tests and docs are automatable end-to-end; architecture and cross-team judgment are not.
rationales.toolMaturity: Coding copilots and agentic dev tools are mature and embedded in the standard toolchain.
rationales.adoption: Most large employers now expect AI-assisted development in this function.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can own test maintenance and small scoped changes, not system design.

tasksGrowing: System architecture and cross-cutting design decisions
Directing and reviewing autonomous coding agents
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 15-1252 (Software Developers), p25-p75

defenseSkills.skill: Directing Agentic Coding Tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot Workspace)

insight: AI coding agents now handle scaffolding, tests, and routine bug fixes end-to-end, but architecture, security tradeoffs, and cross-team judgment still gate the work that matters. The role is shifting from writing every line to directing and verifying what agents produce.
